name: Everbank, National Association
description_short: EverBank is an FDIC-insured national bank offering high-yield savings accounts, CDs, checking, and money market accounts with competitive rates and no monthly fees.
description_long:
EverBank, National Association is a federally-chartered national bank that has positioned itself as a performance-focused financial institution in the retail banking space. The company emphasizes beating national averages on deposit account yields, marketing its accounts as alternatives to traditional banks with lower rates. EverBank offers a range of personal banking products including high-yield savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), checking accounts, and money market accounts, all accessible through online and mobile platforms.

The bank's core product offerings center on deposit accounts designed for savers seeking competitive returns. Their flagship EverBank Performance® Savings account advertises a 3.90% APY for new accounts (as of 04/03/2026), marketed as earning "10x the national average." They also offer a 7-month CD at 4.00% APY. All deposit accounts include FDIC insurance protection up to the standard $250,000 limit per depositor per account category. The bank provides free mobile check deposits, free ATM access through 80,000+ no-fee ATMs nationwide, and automatic reimbursement up to $15 monthly for out-of-network ATM fees (unlimited for accounts with $5,000+ minimum daily balance).

EverBank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on high-yield rates, no monthly account fees, no minimum opening deposit requirements for savings accounts, and widespread ATM access with fee reimbursement. The company has secured a partnership with brand ambassador Trevor Lawrence to underscore its performance positioning. They also note acquiring Sterling Bank clients, suggesting recent consolidation activity in the banking sector. The bank provides 24/7 access to accounts via mobile and online banking with stated strong security measures.

While EverBank offers competitive rates and convenience, prospective customers should note that APYs are variable and subject to change without notice, rates may decrease after promotional periods for new accounts, and the quoted rates are accurate only as of the stated date. Early withdrawal penalties apply to CDs. The company's main appeal is to rate-conscious savers prioritizing yield over branch locations, as EverBank operates as a primarily digital bank with no mention of physical banking centers in the provided content. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: EverBank Performance® Savings Account with high-yield rates
EverBank Performance® CD with fixed rates and terms
Money market accounts with free cash access
Checking accounts with free ATM access
Credit card products (issued through Elan Financial Services partnership)
Account transition services for acquired banks (Sterling Bank)
pros: High-yield savings rate of 3.90% APY for new accounts, marketed as 10x the national average
No monthly account fees on savings and checking products
No minimum opening deposit requirement for Performance® Savings Account
FDIC insurance protection on all deposits up to $250,000 per account category
Access to 80,000+ no-fee ATMs nationwide with up to $15 monthly fee reimbursement
Mobile check deposit functionality for convenient fund transfers
Variable rate accounts allow potential for rate increases in higher-rate environments
cons: APYs are variable and subject to change without notice, with no rate guarantees
Quoted rates are promotional for new accounts only and may not apply to existing customers
No physical banking centers mentioned; primarily digital-only banking operations
CD accounts require $1,000 minimum opening deposit with early withdrawal penalties
Limited information provided about business banking, investment services, or loan products beyond financing mention
best_for: Rate-conscious savers seeking competitive yields on savings and CD products
Customers prioritizing digital/mobile banking convenience over branch access
Individuals wanting multiple high-yield deposit accounts with no monthly fees
diagnosis: EverBank is best for digitally-savvy savers and depositors seeking competitive yields on savings accounts and CDs without monthly fees or minimum balances. The main caveat is that advertised APYs are variable, subject to change without notice, and promotional rates apply only to new accounts, so customers should verify current rates before opening accounts and understand rates may decrease after the promotional period.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
